docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO APOLLO DIAZ, STORE MGR, SPRINT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY SHAFRIR, MOSHE AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAFRIR, MOSHE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPRINT $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $440.00, DEFENDANT SPRINT MAY SATISFY JUDGMENT EITHER: (1) BY PAYMENT OF $400 TO PLAINTIFF SHAFRIR, MOSHE (2) BY CANCELLATION OF PLAINTIFF'S CELLULAR ACCOUNT WITHOUT CHARGE, COSTS, OR PENALTIES ASSESSED AGAINST PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT APOLLO DIAZ AN INDIVIDUAL, DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
